episodes.hypothesis: The direct v1 loop persists turn state, membrane output, edit feedback, and the export family.
episodes.manipulation: blank bootstrap -> chat -> edit feedback -> export
episodes.measured_observable: turn growth, membrane sanitation, retrieval of feedback-derived text, export presence
episodes.confounds: pytest harness rather than uncontrolled live operator session

episodes.hypothesis: Observatory preview/commit/revert persists attributable mutation and rollback.
episodes.manipulation: preview edge_add -> commit -> revert committed event
episodes.measured_observable: edge exists after commit, disappears after revert, ledger entries persist
episodes.confounds: server-side test harness rather than full browser rerun in this step

episodes.hypothesis: Hum refresh remains bounded and does not become a hidden prompt channel.
episodes.manipulation: chat -> edit feedback -> inspect hum payload -> inspect next-turn preview prompt
episodes.measured_observable: feedback counts present in hum; hum file paths absent from prompt assembly
episodes.confounds: bounded harness path; not a claim about all future continuity artifacts
